name: StickyActionFooter
purpose: Provides a recipe-level bottom action block for polished prototypes and guided product flows.
whenToUse: Use when a screen needs a stronger final action area than a loose row of buttons.
Use in prototype flows where the bottom action treatment should be deliberate and repeatable.
whenNotToUse: Do not use when the screen only needs one inline action inside existing content.
Do not treat it as a production navigation shell until the pattern is approved across products.
accessibilityRequirements: Ensure the primary action label clearly describes the next step.
Do not rely on footer position alone to communicate action priority.
